'''zozasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lead|lead]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-z-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lead|lead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zozasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozasithi|zozasithi]] || [[word:zozasiji|zozasiji]] || [[word:zozasishi|zozasishi]] || [[word:zozasiki|zozasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozasuthuthu|zozasuthuthu]] || [[word:zozasujuju|zozasujuju]] || [[word:zozasushushu|zozasushushu]] || [[word:zozasukuku|zozasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozasuthu|zozasuthu]] || [[word:zozasuju|zozasuju]] || [[word:zozasushu|zozasushu]] || [[word:zozasuku|zozasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozasufthuf|zozasufthuf]] || [[word:zozasufjuf|zozasufjuf]] || [[word:zozasufshuf|zozasufshuf]] || [[word:zozasufkuf|zozasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozasethe|zozasethe]] || [[word:zozaseje|zozaseje]] || [[word:zozaseshe|zozaseshe]] || [[word:zozaseke|zozaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozasothotho|zozasothotho]] || [[word:zozasojojo|zozasojojo]] || [[word:zozasoshosho|zozasoshosho]] || [[word:zozasokoko|zozasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozasotho|zozasotho]] || [[word:zozasojo|zozasojo]] || [[word:zozasosho|zozasosho]] || [[word:zozasoko|zozasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozasofthof|zozasofthof]] || [[word:zozasofjof|zozasofjof]] || [[word:zozasofshof|zozasofshof]] || [[word:zozasofkof|zozasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfthÃŸf|zozasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfjÃŸf|zozasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfshÃŸf|zozasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfkÃŸf|zozasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zozasÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zozasÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zozasÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zozasÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfthÃŸf|zozasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfjÃŸf|zozasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfshÃŸf|zozasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfkÃŸf|zozasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfthÃŸf|zozasÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfjÃŸf|zozasÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfshÃŸf|zozasÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zozasÃŸfkÃŸf|zozasÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozasÃḊthÃḊ|zozasÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zozasÃḊjÃḊ|zozasÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zozasÃḊshÃḊ|zozasÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zozasÃḊkÃḊ|zozasÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozasathatha|zozasathatha]] || [[word:zozasajaja|zozasajaja]] || [[word:zozasashasha|zozasashasha]] || [[word:zozasakaka|zozasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozasatha|zozasatha]] || [[word:zozasaja|zozasaja]] || [[word:zozasasha|zozasasha]] || [[word:zozasaka|zozasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozasafthaf|zozasafthaf]] || [[word:zozasafjaf|zozasafjaf]] || [[word:zozasafshaf|zozasafshaf]] || [[word:zozasafkaf|zozasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zozasasha|zozasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozashÃḋsha|zozashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozasrosha|zozasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozasmusha|zozasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozasyasha|zozasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozasnkshÃḋsha|gozozasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozasnkrosha|gozozasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozasnkmusha|gozozasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozasnkyasha|gozozasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zozazasasha|zozazasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozazashÃḋsha|zozazashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozazasrosha|zozazasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozazasmusha|zozazasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozazasyasha|zozazasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozazasnkshÃḋsha|gozozazasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozazasnkrosha|gozozazasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozazasnkmusha|gozozazasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozazasnkyasha|gozozazasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zezÃḊsasha|zezÃḊsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zezÃḊshÃḋsha|zezÃḊshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zezÃḊsrosha|zezÃḊsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zezÃḊsmusha|zezÃḊsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zezÃḊsyasha|zezÃḊsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozezÃḊsnkshÃḋsha|gozezÃḊsnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozezÃḊsnkrosha|gozezÃḊsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozezÃḊsnkmusha|gozezÃḊsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozezÃḊsnkyasha|gozezÃḊsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zozfasasha|zozfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozfashÃḋsha|zozfashÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozfasrosha|zozfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozfasmusha|zozfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozfasyasha|zozfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozfasnkshÃḋsha|gozozfasnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozfasnkrosha|gozozfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozfasnkmusha|gozozfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozfasnkyasha|gozozfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
